proposal.working_title: AI Customer Experience: The Operator Playbook for Turning Service Costs Into Loyalty Compounding
proposal.one_line_angle: Every B2B buyer expects a consumer-grade customer experience now. Here is the AI-powered CX architecture that compounds loyalty without ballooning headcount.
outline_bullets: What an AI customer experience actually looks like inside a B2B operations team in 2026
The four loops every AI customer experience system needs: intent, sentiment, intervention, attribution
Building the playbook: data plumbing, model selection, escalation rules, and measurement that proves loyalty compounded
